title: ornithocephalus bicornis
intro: Ornithocephalus bicornis, also known as the two-horned bird-head plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory infections, due to its flavonoid and glycoside content. Ornithocephalus bicornis is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
